app.name: Gamma
app.tagline: The operations OS for modern consulting firms

shell.palette_degraded: AI search is temporarily paused. Results below are navigation shortcuts.
shell.palette_no_match: No matching action. Try a different keyword.

auth.login_subtitle: The operations OS for modern consulting firms.
auth.email_invalid: That does not look like a valid email.
auth.dev_hint_body: Seeded credentials: admin@gamma.local / gamma_dev_password on tenant t_dev. Replace with real credentials in production.
auth.error_invalid_credentials: The email or password is wrong. Try again.
auth.error_network: We could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.error_generic: Sign in failed. Please try again in a moment.

search.error: Search could not reach the server. Try again in a moment.
search.empty_for_query: No match for "{query}" in employees, clients, or projects. Try one of the shortcuts below.

errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this
errors.app_crash_body: Something broke on our side. We saved a trace and the team has been notified. You can try again or head back to the dashboard.
errors.conflict_fallback_title: This record changed while you were editing
errors.conflict_fallback_body: We could not show a side-by-side view. Your edit was not saved. Reload to see the latest version and try again.

dashboard.attention_empty_title: Nothing waits for you right now
dashboard.attention_empty_body: Approvals, invoices and expenses will surface here as the team submits them.
dashboard.ai_insights_empty_body: Every night we scan your time, projects, clients and cash for anomalies and surface the most important findings here. The first batch is ready after the next overnight run.
dashboard.ai_degraded_banner: Smart insights are temporarily paused. Your KPIs below are live.
dashboard.error_body: We could not reach the server. Your connection may be unstable.
dashboard.empty_body: Import your team or start with a single employee. The dashboard fills in as your data lands.

conflict_resolver.title: Edits don't match. Pick what to keep.
conflict_resolver.subtitle: Someone saved a newer version while you were editing. Choose your version or theirs, field by field.
conflict_resolver.array_hint: This field is an array. Choose one side for the whole list.
